steps.title: Identify the sides
steps.content: From the figure, the right triangle has legs/hypotenuse such that $\sin x^\circ = \dfrac{\text{opposite}}{\text{hypotenuse}}$. The hypotenuse is $73$ and the side opposite angle $x^\circ$ is $63$.

steps.title: Compute sin x
steps.content:
$$\sin x^\circ = \frac{63}{73}$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
